title: juniperus oxycedrus subsp. deltoides
intro: Juniperus oxycedrus subsp. deltoides, also known as the Prickly Juniper, is a subspecies of coniferous tree that belongs to the cypress family, native to the Mediterranean region and parts of North Africa. The medicinal properties of Prickly Juniper include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Prickly Juniper include its ability to help reduce inflammation, relieve urinary tract issues, and support the immune system. Prickly Juniper can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
